mapper.select: SELECT * FROM pa_txn_legal_card WHERE id = #{id, jdbcType=BIGINT}
mapper.update: UPDATE pa_txn_legal_card SET legal_type_id = #{legalTypeId}, current_stage_id = #{currentStageId}, reason_id = #{reasonId}, tenant_id = #{tenantId}, property_id = #{propertyId}, unit_id = #{unitId}, advocate_id = #{advocateId}, case_number = #{caseNumber}, priority = #{priority}, document_status_id = #{documentStatusId}, approval_status_id = #{approvalStatusId}, document_date = #{documentDate}, due_date = #{dueDate}, due_amount = #{dueAmount}, updated_by = #{updatedBy} WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO pa_txn_legal_card_attachment (legal_card_id, document_type_id, file_name, created_by) VALUES (#{legalCardId}, #{documentTypeId}, #{fileName}, #{createdBy}) SELECT LAST_INSERT_ID()
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM pa_txn_legal_card_attachment WHERE legal_card_id = #{legalCardId} ORDER BY created_on, id
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO pa_txn_legal_card_timeline (legal_card_id, status_id, step, `action`, remarks, created_by) VALUES (#{legalCardId}, #{statusId}, #{step}, #{action}, #{remarks}, #{createdBy}) SELECT LAST_INSERT_ID()
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM pa_txn_legal_card_timeline WHERE legal_card_id = #{legalCardId} ORDER BY created_on, id
